creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
I can confirm that on all Poudriere jails (32/64bit FreeBSD12) adding "MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes" to the jails' make.conf makes bash compile. Are you interested in 'before and after' output of a 32 bit and a 64 bit jail?

Having "MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes" on is not preferable, so if that helps you pinpoint the trigger, that's fine with me.
